arts.ttl: Napoli continue Scudetto pursuit in Monza
arts.sum: Napoli have scored at least two goals in three games against Monza in Serie A (10 goals in total), failing to score in the other two; only Atalanta (five) and Inter (four) have scored at least two goals in more matches against the Brianzoli in the competition. Since their first home game in Serie A, on 13 August 2022, Monza have lost 24 home matches (W14 D16); in this period only Hellas Verona (26) have suffered more defeats at home in the competition – 24 home defeats also for Empoli.

arts.sum: Stadio Brianeto forms the backdrop for Saturday's 'make or break' Serie A encounter between basement boys Monza and runners-up Napoli. Three points are imperative for both teams, as anything less could put a final nail in the coffin of their season dreams.
